channel.title: Mysql on ivomarino.com
channel.description: Recent content in Mysql on ivomarino.com

item.title: Scaling MySQL Beyond Kubernetes: When Backups Become The Blocker
item.description: We ran MySQL in Kubernetes for years until the data scaled from GB to TB. Kubernetes wasn’t the problem—backups were. Kasten (the Kubernetes backup tool) was never designed for databases at our scale. Learn why we moved MySQL off Kubernetes and the backup solution we built to solve this infrastructure challenge.
